blocks.text: Hovland charges at Åberg in final-round PLAYERS showdown
Åberg holds the lead at -13, but Hovland's -2 round has him within three — a Scandinavian duel at golf's fifth major with the richest prize in the sport on the line.
⚽ Tue 18:45 — Bodø/Glimt at Sporting CP, level on aggregate, Norwegian club history at stake
